title: PVP Optimization +
description: PVP Optimization+ is a performance-boosted Minecraft pack designed for smooth, lag-free gameplay and competitive PVP action. Whether you're battling in duels or dominating on factions, this pack combines essential PVP mods with powerful FPS optimization.
body:
⚔️ PvP Optimization+
Smooth FPS. Clean HUD. Combat Ready.

🎯 PvP Optimization+ is a lightweight client-side modpack focused on boosting FPS and enhancing your PvP experience — no bloat, just what you need to win.

🚀 Features
💨 FPS Boost – Sodium, Lithium, Indium, Dynamic FPS & more
🛡️ Combat HUD – Totem counter, potion tracker, AppleSkin, status effects
💬 Better Chat – Chat Heads, Chat Plus for cleaner comms
🕹️ PvP Tools – ToggleSprint, Keystrokes, custom crosshair

📦 Plug & play. Built for ranked, duels, factions & more.
🎮 Ideal for low-end and high-end systems alike.
